name: school_digest_author_visit_07
description: Real-world school digest with Valentine's Day party photos (past) and newsletter with future author visit

input.subject: Feb 12, 2026 Digest: 2 new messages from Walnut Heights School today
input.snippet: Daily digest - Vday Party Photos, Newsletter
input.body_text:
Daily digest created for Toni Melisma

1. Vday Party Photos

Posted by Brenda Dos Santos Szeto on Wednesday, Feb 11 at 7:19 PM in Kindergarten-Koeltl

Hi Room 102 Families Our Valentine’s Day party was such a sweet success! The kids had an amazing time, and it truly wouldn’t have been possible without all of you. A heartfelt THANK YOU to our wonder teacher ms Koeltl and everyone who volunteered their time, donated items, helped set up, or contributed in any way. Your generosity and support made the celebration extra special for the class. Here's a link of some photos we took today. Please let me know if you cant access it.

See you all next week! Wishing everyone a wonderful and safe super long weekend.
Arash, Brenda, & Renee

2. Newsletter

Posted by Reganne Koeltl on Thursday, Feb 12 at 11:16 AM in Kindergarten-Koeltl

Double Author Visit on March 12th

If students would like to order books and have them signed on the day of the visit, please place orders through Rakestraw Bookstore. The books will be delivered on the day of the visit, and the authors will sign them for students.

*** Shipping Address when placing an order is the school’s address:

4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596

events.title: Double Author Visit
events.location: Walnut Heights School, 4064 Walnut Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
events.description: Author visit at school with book signing. Books can be pre-ordered through Rakestraw Bookstore.

events.title: Spring Music Showcase
events.description: TK and K music showcase. Livestream available.

notes: Real-world school digest with 2 posts. Post 1 is Valentine's Day party photos (past event, should NOT be extracted). Post 2 is a class newsletter mentioning a Double Author Visit on March 12th - this is a future school event but no specific time given, so it should be all-day. Image img_02.jpg is a flyer for the Spring Music Showcase on March 24 at 9:30 AM in the Walnut Heights MPR (TK and K only) - this event is only discoverable from the image. Medium difficulty because LLM must distinguish past from future events and extract image-only events.
